blockers.reason: Entire mas.gov.sg under maintenance
blockers.details:
- **Status:** waiting
- **What's needed:** MAS website to come back online from maintenance
- **Details:** As of 2026-04-27, the entire mas.gov.sg website (all pages, PDFs, media) returns a maintenance page. No content is accessible. The site normally hosts circulars at `/regulation/circulars/{slug}` with PDFs at `/-/media/`. Backend appears to be Sitecore/Solr (field names like `mas_date_tdt`). Retry when site is restored.
- **Blocked in manifest.yaml** with reason `server_maintenance`

blockers.reason: COMPLETE ✅

- **Resolution:** Credentials were found pre-populated in .env.template. Source now fully operational.

  - 16 sample records from 8 major French codes (Code civil, Code pénal, Code du travail, etc.)
  - Full text via PISTE/Légifrance OAuth2 API
  - Avg 1K chars/article, 78+ codes with 50K+ total articles
- **Marked complete in manifest.yaml**

blockers.reason: No accessible full text API
blockers.details:

- **Resolution:** Full text IS available via ELI endpoints. Source rebuilt with full text support on 2026-02-08. 12 sample records fetched, average 17K characters per document.
- **Implementation:** Uses ELI URIs to browse `/eli/{type}/{year}` for document discovery, then fetches full HTML text via `/eli/{type}/{yyyy}/{mm}/{dd}/{numac}/justel`. Covers loi, decret, ordonnance, arrete document types.
- **License:** CC Zero (CC 0)

blockers.reason: Firewall-level geo-block drops all non-Mexican IP traffic
blockers.details:
- **URL**: https://www.tjacdmx.gob.mx/
- **Blocked reason**: `server_geo_block`
- **Date**: 2026-04-23
- **Details**: All four TJACdMx subdomains (www, tribunal, versiones-publicas, siprod)
  are on Totalplay Telecomunicaciones infrastructure (187.188.164.x/187.189.178.x)
  with firewall rules silently dropping non-Mexican TCP connections. No CDN/WAF involved.
  Legacy PHP endpoint (sentencia_consulta.php?id={N}) has 120K+ sequential records.
  Versiones-publicas has UUID-based paginated search.

blockers.reason: Vietnam Competition and Consumer Authority
blockers.details:
- **URL**: https://vcc.gov.vn/ (formerly vcca.gov.vn)
- **Status**: Blocked
- **Reason**: VCCA renamed to VCC in April 2023. Website is SPA-rendered (listing pages return empty HTML without JavaScript). No API endpoints found. Competition enforcement articles are brief news summaries (~250 words), not full decision texts. Legal documents section also requires JS rendering. vcca.gov.vn has SSL cert mismatch (serves idea.gov.vn cert).
- **Blocked since**: 2026-04-29
- **Action needed**: Requires b
